name: Eq Resources Limited
analysis: EQR has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 31% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$0.2700, stop A$0.1930, target A$0.3100 (0.52:1) — then trail it.
